raw_extraction.innovation: Gato is a single, large-scale transformer sequence model trained on a diverse set of multimodal, multi-task, multi-embodiment tasks, enabling it to perform actions in text, vision, and robotics domains using the same network weights
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Simulated control tasks (e.g., Meta-World, BabyAI, DM Control Suite, ALE Atari), vision-language datasets (e.g., MassiveText, ALIGN, Conceptual Captions, M3W), robotics datasets (RGB Stacking simulator and real robot)
raw_extraction.application: Multi-modal task execution (dialogue, image captioning, Atari gaming, robot manipulation, instruction following)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing a single generalist agent capable of handling diverse tasks across text, vision, and physical interaction without task-specific models
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with multimodal tokenization
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on specific task demonstrations for few-shot adaptation
raw_extraction.extension: Data is serialized into a flat sequence of tokens across modalities (text, images, actions, proprioception), enabling a unified transformer model to process heterogeneous inputs via prompt conditioning and autoregressive generation
